title: tylophora juventas
intro: Tylophora juventas, also known as "Amrita", is an Indian medicinal plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Tylophora juventas include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and lowering blood pressure. Tylophora juventas can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, skin conditions, and other ailments.
